global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear focus on a promotional message.
global.main_message: Promoting a special offer on a product with a call to action.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A vibrant green background fills the canvas, providing a lively and fresh atmosphere.

elements.label: BoltCart logo
elements.description: The logo 'BoltCart' is displayed prominently at the top, featuring bold, modern typography.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A bright yellow 'SALE' badge is positioned at the top right, drawing attention with its contrasting color.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small 'UGC' label is placed at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Main text
elements.description: The main text reads 'Your next favorite pick' in a large, bold font, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small price tag displaying '$4.99' is located below the main text, emphasizing affordability.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A prominent 'Claim reward' button is positioned below the price, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element is located at the bottom left, adding visual interest without specific identification.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: Another small decorative element is found at the bottom center, complementing the overall design.

elements.label: Additional decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element is positioned at the bottom right, enhancing the visual appeal.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick $4.99h2 Claim reward

elements.label: Shop bestsellers text
elements.description: The text 'shop bestsellers now' is displayed in a smaller font below the price, guiding user action.
